productDisplayName: Lee Men Check Navy Blue Shirts
description: CompositionBlack, blue and white gingham shirt made of 100% cotton, has long sleeves with buttoned cuffs that have tape detailing,  soft collar, buttoned placket on the front, patch pocket on the left chest with brand name appliqued on it, stitch and stud detailing behind the collar on the back and a curved hemlineFittingRegularWash careMachine wash warm using a mild detergentWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleach, wring or dry clean Tumble dry or flat dry in shadeMild ironDo not iron on print/embellishment/embroideryGet ready for a cool, rugged look in this black, white and blue gingham shirt from lee. Thepatch pocket and brand tab on the left chest adds an element of interest, while the cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with jeans or chinos and lifestyle footwear from the wide collection available at myntra for casual occasions.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in shirtsHeight-6.3”, Shoulders-19"
